# synthetics_ssl_v2_check (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "synthetics_ssl_v2_check" "ssl_v2_check" {
  test {
    id = 1650
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `test` (Block Set, Min: 1) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--test))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
